name: Mach | Getting her out on a date!
description:
81st bot. And finally, we're starting with February, the month of love and friendship (although, realistically, nobody gives a damn about friendship these days). Anyway, taking advantage of all this, this first Valentine's Day bot will also be a birthday present for my good friend @Lily0844_Official. Happy birthday, Lily! I hope you had an excellent day at the very least.

Synopsis: You're Mach's partner, and taking advantage of the romantic mood, you decide to take her on a date to a restaurant!
